mnemonics: Victoria Very Clearly Makes Incredible Machines Inside My Room
Virtually Very Clever Makes Incredible Machines Into My Resources
keyPoints: Virtualization is a technique that creates multiple virtual machines on a single physical host
Virtualization Structure/Tools and Mechanisms include Hypervisors, Virtual Machine Monitors, and APIs
Virtualization of CPU/Memory and I/O devices is achieved through Hardware Virtualization and Software Virtualization
Virtual Clusters are groups of virtual machines that share resources and work together as a single entity
Resource Management in Virtualization involves allocating and deallocating resources such as CPU, Memory, and I/O devices
